{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320163032A1C705BBC16ACF258D7E"}"},"total":4595},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7214108180471743292","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材新颖。幕后，写的很好。不像别的小说，挂着羊头卖狗肉。说幕后，说反派，结果都写成主角。我第一次读这种几乎是完全幕后的小说，个人感觉很不错，很合胃口。是值得一读的佳作。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1679665535,"group_id":"7193185472753962042","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无无无无无无无无无无","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3yWaL1tUldMHhvrmkBa1IU=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c769aa573e5c483d8cce5e625d72e1d0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536101&x-signature=CO2%2BH6cO%2F9iVRSuBVFndYtF9l1A%3D","user_id":"544978859460765","user_name":"亿钾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"544978859460765","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7193185472753962042","book_info":{"abstract":"【幕后/玩家/游戏/无女主】
那一天，划时代级的全息游戏《封印之地》横空出世，直接掀起了整个世界的游戏热潮，平均在线人数一度超过三十亿！
但没有人知道，在未来的某一天，游戏中的一切都会降临到现实！
封印之塔、旧日军团、末日教会……
只有身为重生者的叶秋知道这一切。
但我并不在意，因为……
“我就是这场游戏的发起者。”
“我会在封印之塔的顶端等待一位挑战者的到来，以最终BOSS的身份。”
————————————————————
本书又名：
《游戏降临，我是幕后黑手》
《因为太无聊所以开启超能时代》

lse}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7255648949443461907","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我看过的所有网游文里能排前三。现实和游戏穿插的很好，我能想到的一切爽点，里边基本都有。可以说越看到后面越精彩。文章伏笔埋的很好，大部分伏笔都填坑了。就是人物性格的刻画略有缺失，但毕竟写的人物比较多，这点可以忽略不计。如果你仔细读就会发现，故事背景挺宏大的且不缺细节，都能串联的起来。作者缝合怪之王名头坐实了。
  总而言之，很适合去追的一本书。也希望作者大大更新快一点，把情节质量保持住。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689337502,"group_id":"7193185472753962042","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新人入坑，不喜可喷，别划走","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7VOKSWtinLKlYmjB1u/WRVZb+5qoo2UICvAQwoTRDKk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/82e6918becf940c18a0e27d284b4ed7c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529239&x-signature=T35fudpTIcbdNWWtBJZMJNz6rMI%3D","user_id":"4209384172292903","user_name":"衫祂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4209384172292903","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7193185472753962042","book_info":{"abstract":"【幕后/玩家/游戏/无女主】
